requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Safety Requirements — Secondary Lithium/Na-ion Cells and Batteries (Industrial Applications)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池安全要求——工业用二次锂/钠离子电芯及电池
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池安全要求——工業用二次鋰/鈉離子電芯及電池

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 specifies safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, covering electrical, mechanical, environmental and safety abuse tests. Its scope title and text explicitly reference 'lithium' technology; the standard is largely test-method based, but Na-ion cells are not within the explicit scope of EN IEC 62619 — confirmation from CENELEC or an EU notified body is recommended before relying on this standard for Na-ion CE evidence. LVD 2014/35/EU imposes the mandatory legal safety obligations for covered electrical equipment; harmonised standards such as EN IEC 62619 are voluntary routes that may confer a presumption of conformity when correctly applied, and alternatives are allowed if the technical file demonstrates conformity with the Directive's safety objectives.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022规定了工业用二次锂电芯及电池的安全要求，涵盖电气、机械、环境及滥用测试。其标准名称及范围文本明确指向“锂”技术；钠离子电芯不在EN IEC 62619的明确适用范围内——如拟将本标准作为钠离子CE证据，建议先向CENELEC或欧盟公告机构确认。LVD 2014/35/EU规定的是适用电气设备的强制性法律安全义务；EN IEC 62619等协调标准属于自愿采用的合规推定路径，正确适用时可赋予合规推定；只要技术文件能证明符合该指令的安全目标，也可采用其他技术方案。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022規定了工業用二次鋰電芯及電池的安全要求，涵蓋電氣、機械、環境及濫用測試。其標準名稱及範圍文本明確指向「鋰」技術；鈉離子電芯不在EN IEC 62619的明確適用範圍內——如擬將本標準作為鈉離子CE證據，建議先向CENELEC或歐盟公告機構確認。LVD 2014/35/EU規定的是適用電氣設備的強制性法律安全義務；EN IEC 62619等協調標準屬於自願採用的合規推定路徑，正確適用時可賦予合規推定；只要技術文件能證明符合該指令的安全目標，也可採用其他技術方案。

standards_or_laws.title: EN IEC 62619:2022 — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications
standards_or_laws.note: Scope explicitly covers 'lithium' cells; Na-ion is not within explicit scope — notified-body confirmation required before use for Na-ion CE marking. URL updated 2026-06-12: old webstore.nsf path returned 403; replaced with confirmed IEC webstore canonical URL.

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 covers safety requirements for lithium-ion battery energy storage systems and is scoped to Li-ion only. China published GB/T 44265-2024 (Electrical energy storage power station — Technical specifications for sodium-ion battery), effective 1 March 2025: this is the first dedicated CN national standard for Na-ion stationary storage. It is a technical specification standard covering performance and some safety aspects at cell and system level for Na-ion BESS. The CQC voluntary certification programme CQC13-464292-2025, aligned with GB/T 44265-2024, is available from 2025. GB/T 42288-2022 addresses electrochemical energy storage station safety more broadly. No dedicated comprehensive Na-ion cell-safety standard equivalent to EN IEC 62619 exists in the CN framework; GB/T 44265-2024 covers the closest scope but is not a direct cell-safety standard.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023涵盖锂离子电池储能系统安全要求，范围仅限锂离子。中国已发布GB/T 44265-2024（电力储能电站——钠离子电池技术规范），自2025年3月1日起生效：这是中国首个专门针对固定储能用钠离子电池的国家标准，在电芯和系统层面涵盖钠离子BESS的性能指标及部分安全要求。与GB/T 44265-2024配套的CQC自愿性认证计划（CQC13-464292-2025）已于2025年启动。GB/T 42288-2022涵盖更广泛的电化学储能站安全要求。国内框架中目前尚无相当于EN IEC 62619的专项钠离子电芯安全标准；GB/T 44265-2024涵盖最接近的范围，但并非专项电芯安全标准。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023涵蓋鋰離子電池儲能系統安全要求，範圍僅限鋰離子。中國已發布GB/T 44265-2024（電力儲能電站——鈉離子電池技術規範），自2025年3月1日起生效：這是中國首個專門針對固定儲能用鈉離子電池的國家標準，在電芯和系統層面涵蓋鈉離子BESS的性能指標及部分安全要求。與GB/T 44265-2024配套的CQC自願性認證計劃（CQC13-464292-2025）已於2025年啟動。GB/T 42288-2022涵蓋更廣泛的電化學儲能站安全要求。國內框架中目前尚無相當於EN IEC 62619的專項鈉離子電芯安全標準；GB/T 44265-2024涵蓋最接近的範圍，但並非專項電芯安全標準。

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 44265-2024 — Electrical energy storage power station: Technical specifications for sodium-ion battery
standards_or_laws.note: Issued 23 August 2024; effective 1 March 2025. First dedicated CN Na-ion stationary storage standard; CQC voluntary certification CQC13-464292-2025 aligned with this standard.

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage
GB/T 42288-2022 — Safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage station

gap.en: EN IEC 62619 was developed for lithium-cell chemistry and its title and scope explicitly reference 'lithium'; Na-ion cells are not within EN IEC 62619's explicit scope and CENELEC has not issued a corrigendum or scope extension for Na-ion. Exporters should obtain a written position from their chosen EU notified body on whether Na-ion cells can be tested under EN IEC 62619 with deviation justification, or whether a supplementary test protocol is needed. No harmonised EU standard specifically named for Na-ion cell safety exists yet. On the CN side, GB/T 44265-2024 (effective March 2025) covers Na-ion stationary storage as a technical specification standard, which partially closes the domestic standards gap but is not an equivalent to EN IEC 62619 as a comprehensive cell-safety standard.
gap.zh: EN IEC 62619是针对锂电池化学体系开发的，其标准名称及范围文本明确指向“锂”；钠离子电芯不在EN IEC 62619的明确适用范围内，CENELEC亦未就钠离子发布勘误或范围扩展。出口商宜向其选定的欧盟公告机构获取书面意见，确认钠离子电芯能否在附有偏差说明的情况下依据EN IEC 62619进行测试，或是否需要补充测试规程。目前尚无专门针对钠离子电芯安全的欧盟协调标准。在国内方面，GB/T 44265-2024（自2025年3月起生效）以技术规范标准形式涵盖钠离子固定储能，部分缩小了国内标准差距，但不等同于EN IEC 62619所代表的综合电芯安全标准。
gap.zht: EN IEC 62619是針對鋰電池化學體系開發的，其標準名稱及範圍文本明確指向「鋰」；鈉離子電芯不在EN IEC 62619的明確適用範圍內，CENELEC亦未就鈉離子發布勘誤或範圍擴展。出口商宜向其選定的歐盟公告機構獲取書面意見，確認鈉離子電芯能否在附有偏差說明的情況下依據EN IEC 62619進行測試，或是否需要補充測試規程。目前尚無專門針對鈉離子電芯安全的歐盟協調標準。在國內方面，GB/T 44265-2024（自2025年3月起生效）以技術規範標準形式涵蓋鈉離子固定儲能，部分縮小了國內標準差距，但不等同於EN IEC 62619所代表的綜合電芯安全標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal framework — CE marking and LVD 2014/35/EU safety objectives apply for covered voltage ranges; EN IEC 62619 is a voluntary harmonised-standard route that may confer presumption of conformity when applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 44265-2024 is the first dedicated Na-ion stationary ESS standard, voluntary, effective March 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 covers Li-ion only; mandatory safety requirements may apply via project-specific procurement specs)

compliance_verdict.en: For informational purposes only. Na-ion cells exported from China to the EU as part of industrial ESS must meet the applicable EU legal safety obligations, including LVD 2014/35/EU where the voltage range is covered. EN IEC 62619 may be used only as a voluntary presumption-of-conformity route where its scope and deviations are accepted; it is not binding law and not an exclusive route. EN IEC 62619 explicitly scopes to 'lithium' cells, so Na-ion applicability should be resolved with an EU notified body or competent conformity-assessment adviser. No harmonised EU standard specifically covering Na-ion cell safety has been published.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。从中国出口至欧盟的工业储能系统中的钠离子电池，须满足适用的欧盟法律安全义务；在电压范围适用时包括LVD 2014/35/EU。EN IEC 62619仅可在其范围及偏差被接受的情况下，作为自愿采用的合规推定路径使用；它本身不是有约束力的法律，也不是排他性路径。EN IEC 62619明确限于“锂”电芯，因此钠离子适用性应由欧盟公告机构或合格合规评估顾问确认。目前未发现专门涵盖钠离子电芯安全的欧盟协调标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。從中國出口至歐盟的工業儲能系統中的鈉離子電池，須滿足適用的歐盟法律安全義務；在電壓範圍適用時包括LVD 2014/35/EU。EN IEC 62619僅可在其範圍及偏差被接受的情況下，作為自願採用的合規推定路徑使用；它本身不是有約束力的法律，也不是排他性路徑。EN IEC 62619明確限於「鋰」電芯，因此鈉離子適用性應由歐盟公告機構或合格合規評估顧問確認。目前未發現專門涵蓋鈉離子電芯安全的歐盟協調標準。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Storage System Safety — Electrochemical ESS Safety Requirements (Chemistry-Agnostic)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统安全——电化学储能系统安全要求（化学体系中性）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統安全——電化學儲能系統安全要求（化學體系中性）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 (Ed. 2.0, published December 2025) (Electrical Energy Storage — Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrochemical-based energy storage systems) supersedes the 2020 edition (Ed. 1.0). The standard's scope covers grid-connected electrochemical ESS across all chemistries. Ed. 2.0 explicitly lists lithium-ion, lead-acid, nickel, flow batteries, and lithium metal solid-state batteries and includes an 'other technologies' clause. Room-temperature sodium-ion is not explicitly named in the scope, but falls within the 'other technologies' clause — this is a strong basis for applicability, though confirmation with a notified body is still recommended before relying on IEC 62933-5-2 for Na-ion CE marking. The standard addresses system-level safety including thermal runaway, BMS requirements, fire protection, installation and O&M. In the EU, conformity may be demonstrated under LVD 2014/35/EU and the Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 for stationary storage applications; IEC 62933-5-2's harmonised status under the Battery Regulation is not yet confirmed in the OJ.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2025（Ed. 2.0，2025年12月发布）（电力储能——第5-2部分：并网电化学储能系统安全要求）取代2020版（Ed. 1.0）。该标准范围覆盖各类化学体系的并网电化学储能系统。Ed. 2.0明确列明锂离子、铅酸、镍基、液流电池和金属锂固态电池，并设有「其他技术」条款。室温钠离子电池未在范围内明确命名，但属于「其他技术」条款的适用对象——这为适用性提供了有力依据，但在将IEC 62933-5-2用于钠离子CE认证前，仍建议向公告机构确认。该标准涵盖系统级安全要求，包括热失控、电池管理系统要求、消防保护、安装及运维。在欧盟，可通过LVD 2014/35/EU及适用于固定储能的《电池法规》(EU) 2023/1542证明符合性；IEC 62933-5-2在《电池法规》下的协调标准地位尚未在欧盟官方公报确认。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2025（Ed. 2.0，2025年12月發布）（電力儲能——第5-2部分：並網電化學儲能系統安全要求）取代2020版（Ed. 1.0）。該標準範圍覆蓋各類化學體系的並網電化學儲能系統。Ed. 2.0明確列明鋰離子、鉛酸、鎳基、液流電池和金屬鋰固態電池，並設有「其他技術」條款。室溫鈉離子電池未在範圍內明確命名，但屬於「其他技術」條款的適用對象——這為適用性提供了有力依據，但在將IEC 62933-5-2用於鈉離子CE認證前，仍建議向公告機構確認。該標準涵蓋系統級安全要求，包括熱失控、電池管理系統要求、消防保護、安裝及運維。在歐盟，可透過LVD 2014/35/EU及適用於固定儲能的《電池法規》(EU) 2023/1542證明符合性；IEC 62933-5-2在《電池法規》下的協調標準地位尚未在歐盟官方公報確認。

standards_or_laws.title: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 (Ed. 2.0) — Electrical energy storage (EES) systems — Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems — Electrochemical-based systems
standards_or_laws.note: Ed. 2.0 (Dec 2025) supersedes Ed. 1.0 (2020). Scope covers all chemistries; Ed. 2.0 lists Li-ion, lead-acid, Ni, flow batteries, Li metal solid-state, and 'other technologies' — room-temperature Na-ion is not explicitly named but falls within the 'other technologies' clause. Confirm applicability for Na-ion CE marking with an EU notified body before reliance. IEC 62933-5-2 harmonised status under EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 not yet confirmed in OJ as of mid-2026. URL updated 2026-06-12: canonical IEC webstore path confirmed.

standards_or_laws.title: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 — Batteries and waste batteries (EU Battery Regulation)

summary.en: GB/T 34120-2017 covers general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems and is chemistry-agnostic at the system level. GB/T 42288-2022 addresses safety requirements specifically for electrochemical energy storage stations, also applicable across chemistries. These are the closest CN system-level equivalents to IEC 62933-5-2. China published GB/T 44265-2024 (Electrical energy storage power station — Technical specifications for sodium-ion battery), effective 1 March 2025: this is the first dedicated Chinese national standard for Na-ion stationary ESS, covering technical specifications. It addresses performance and some safety aspects but is a technical specification standard rather than a comprehensive safety standard on the scale of IEC 62933-5-2. The CQC voluntary certification programme (CQC13-464292-2025) aligned with GB/T 44265-2024 became available in 2025.
summary.zh: GB/T 34120-2017涵盖电化学储能系统的通用技术要求，在系统层面具有化学体系中性特征。GB/T 42288-2022专门针对电化学储能站的安全要求，同样适用于各类化学体系。这两项标准是IEC 62933-5-2在国内系统层面最接近的等效标准。中国已于2024年发布GB/T 44265-2024（电力储能电站——钠离子电池技术规范），自2025年3月1日起生效：这是中国首个专门针对固定储能用钠离子电池的国家标准，涵盖技术规范。该标准涉及性能指标及部分安全要求，但属于技术规范标准，而非IEC 62933-5-2规模的综合安全标准。与GB/T 44265-2024配套的CQC自愿性认证计划（CQC13-464292-2025）已于2025年启动。
summary.zht: GB/T 34120-2017涵蓋電化學儲能系統的通用技術要求，在系統層面具有化學體系中性特徵。GB/T 42288-2022專門針對電化學儲能站的安全要求，同樣適用於各類化學體系。這兩項標準是IEC 62933-5-2在國內系統層面最接近的等效標準。中國已於2024年發布GB/T 44265-2024（電力儲能電站——鈉離子電池技術規範），自2025年3月1日起生效：這是中國首個專門針對固定儲能用鈉離子電池的國家標準，涵蓋技術規範。該標準涉及性能指標及部分安全要求，但屬於技術規範標準，而非IEC 62933-5-2規模的綜合安全標準。與GB/T 44265-2024配套的CQC自願性認證計劃（CQC13-464292-2025）已於2025年啟動。

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 44265-2024 — Electrical energy storage power station: Technical specifications for sodium-ion battery
standards_or_laws.note: Issued 23 August 2024; effective 1 March 2025. First dedicated CN national standard for Na-ion stationary storage. CQC voluntary certification CQC13-464292-2025 aligned with this standard.

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 34120-2017 — General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage system
standards_or_laws.note: Chemistry-agnostic system-level standard; verify exact record on openstd.samr.gov.cn

standards_or_laws.title: GB/T 42288-2022 — Safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage station
standards_or_laws.note: Chemistry-agnostic safety standard for ESS stations; verify exact record on openstd.samr.gov.cn

gap.en: IEC 62933-5-2 is chemistry-agnostic in scope, making it more directly applicable to Na-ion ESS than EN IEC 62619. However, Na-ion-specific test data (e.g., thermal runaway propagation characteristics, electrolyte composition hazards) may differ from Li-ion; the standard's test protocols may need supplementary validation for Na-ion systems. On the CN side, GB/T 44265-2024 (effective March 2025) is the first dedicated Na-ion ESS technical specification and narrows the standards gap: exporters can now point to a domestic Na-ion-specific standard, though it is a technical specification rather than a comprehensive safety standard on the scale of IEC 62933-5-2. The EU Battery Regulation (2023/1542) introduces additional due-diligence and documentation requirements (carbon footprint, supply chain) that apply to Na-ion batteries for stationary storage and are not mirrored in current CN standards.
gap.zh: IEC 62933-5-2在范围上具有化学体系中性，相较EN IEC 62619更直接适用于钠离子储能系统。然而，钠离子专项测试数据（如热失控蔓延特性、电解质成分危害）可能与锂离子存在差异；该标准的测试规程可能需要针对钠离子系统进行补充验证。在国内方面，GB/T 44265-2024（自2025年3月起生效）是首个专门针对钠离子储能系统的技术规范，缩小了标准差距：出口商现可援引国内专项钠离子标准，但该标准属于技术规范而非IEC 62933-5-2规模的综合安全标准。欧盟《电池法规》(2023/1542)还对固定储能用钠离子电池引入了额外的尽职调查及文件要求（碳足迹、供应链），这些要求在现行国内标准中尚无对应体现。
gap.zht: IEC 62933-5-2在範圍上具有化學體系中性，相較EN IEC 62619更直接適用於鈉離子儲能系統。然而，鈉離子專項測試數據（如熱失控蔓延特性、電解質成分危害）可能與鋰離子存在差異；該標準的測試規程可能需要針對鈉離子系統進行補充驗證。在國內方面，GB/T 44265-2024（自2025年3月起生效）是首個專門針對鈉離子儲能系統的技術規範，縮小了標準差距：出口商現可援引國內專項鈉離子標準，但該標準屬於技術規範而非IEC 62933-5-2規模的綜合安全標準。歐盟《電池法規》(2023/1542)還對固定儲能用鈉離子電池引入了額外的盡職調查及文件要求（碳足跡、供應鏈），這些要求在現行國內標準中尚無對應體現。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal framework — LVD 2014/35/EU and EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 apply where in scope; IEC 62933-5-2 is a voluntary supporting technical standard and its harmonised status under the EU Battery Regulation was not confirmed in the OJ as of mid-2026
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 44265-2024 and GB/T 34120 and GB/T 42288 are voluntary national standards; CQC voluntary certification CQC13-464292-2025 available from 2025; mandatory requirements may apply via project-specific grid-connection or safety-review specs)

compliance_verdict.en: For informational purposes only. IEC 62933-5-2 is likely a relevant voluntary system-level safety standard for Na-ion ESS exported to the EU due to its chemistry-agnostic scope, but it is not itself the binding legal obligation or an exclusive route to conformity. Its harmonised status under EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 and LVD 2014/35/EU should be verified with a notified body or conformity-assessment adviser. Na-ion-specific test data requirements may necessitate supplementary testing beyond standard Li-ion protocols. The EU Battery Regulation introduces additional obligations (carbon footprint declaration, supply-chain due diligence) not covered by IEC 62933-5-2 alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。由于化学体系中性的范围，IEC 62933-5-2可能是出口至欧盟的钠离子储能系统在系统层面相关的自愿安全标准，但它本身不是有约束力的法律义务，也不是排他性合规路径。其在《欧盟电池法规》2023/1542及LVD 2014/35/EU下的协调标准地位应向公告机构或合规评估顾问确认。钠离子专项测试数据要求可能需要超越标准锂离子规程的补充测试。欧盟《电池法规》还引入了IEC 62933-5-2本身未覆盖的额外义务（碳足迹申报、供应链尽职调查）。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。由於化學體系中性的範圍，IEC 62933-5-2可能是出口至歐盟的鈉離子儲能系統在系統層面相關的自願安全標準，但它本身不是有約束力的法律義務，也不是排他性合規路徑。其在《歐盟電池法規》2023/1542及LVD 2014/35/EU下的協調標準地位應向公告機構或合規評估顧問確認。鈉離子專項測試數據要求可能需要超越標準鋰離子規程的補充測試。歐盟《電池法規》還引入了IEC 62933-5-2本身未覆蓋的額外義務（碳足跡申報、供應鏈盡職調查）。
